sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n109110" key="u(posiga/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑποσῑγάω</orth>, <sense id="n109110.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be silent at</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">during,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0026.tlg002.perseus-grc1:162" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aeschin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.162</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
